song_name: Michael Jackson - Billie Jean - Billie Eilish - Bad Guy - Bury A Friend
version_description: A Mashup of Billie Jean, Bad Guy and Bury A Friend which was put together in this way by AtlaMoon.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
  She was more like a beauty queen from a movie scene[/tab]
[tab]                                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
I said don`t mind but what do you mean, I am the one[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Who will dance on the floor in the round[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
She said I am the one[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Who will dance on the floor in the round?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
She told me her name was Billie Jean as she caused a scene.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Then ev`ry head turned with eyes that dreamed[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Of being the one,[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Who will dance on the floor in the round[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
People always told me, be careful what you do.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
And don`t go around breaking young girls' hearts[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
And mother always told me, be careful who you love,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]B7[/ch]
And be careful what you do, `cause the lie becomes the truth, hey[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
  Billie Jean is not my lover,[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]Am[/ch]
She's just a girl who claims that I am the one[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
But the kid is not my son[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
She says I am the one,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
But the kid is not my son[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
For forty days and forty nights, law was on her side[/tab]
[tab]                                                         [ch]Am[/ch]
But who can stand when she`s in demand, her schemes and plans[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
`Cause we danced on the floor in the round.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
So take my strong advice: Just remember to always think twice[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
She told my baby we danced till three, and she looked at me,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Then showed a photo. My baby cried.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
His eyes were like mine.[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Can we dance on the floor in the round?[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
People always told me, be careful what you do.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
And don`t go around breaking young girls' hearts[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
But you came and stood right by me, just a smell of sweet perfume.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]B7[/ch]
This happened much too soon. She called me to her room, hey[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
  Billie Jean is not my lover,[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]Am[/ch]
She's just a girl who claims that I am the one[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
But the kid is not my son[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Billie Jean is not my lover,[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]Am[/ch]
She's just a girl who claims that I am the one[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
But the kid is not my son[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
She says I am the one,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
But the kid is not my son[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
White shirt now red, my bloody nose, sleepin', you're on your tippy toes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                 [ch]B7[/ch]
Creepin' around like no one knows, think you're so criminal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Bruises on both my knees for you, don't say thank you or please, I do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]B7[/ch]
What I want when I'm wanting to, my soul so cynical[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
So you're a tough guy, like it really rough guy[/tab]

Just can't get enough guy, chest always so puffed guy
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm that bad type, make your mama sad type[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]B7[/ch]
Make your girlfriend mad tight, might seduce your dad type[/tab]
N.C.
I'm the bad guy, duh

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]B7[/ch]
I'm the bad guy[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab]N.C.            [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
What do you want from me, why don't you run from me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
What are you wondering, what do you know?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Why aren't you scared of me, why do you care for me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B7[/ch]           N.C.
When we all fall asleep, where do we go? (come here)[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     N.C.
   Say it, spit it out, what is it exactly?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   You're payin', is the amount cleanin' you out, am I satisfactory?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Today I'm thinkin' about, the things that are deadly[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
The way I'm drinkin' you down, like I wanna drown, like I wanna end me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                        N.C.
   Step on the glass, staple your tongue (ahh-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                N.C.
   Bury a friend, try to wake up (ah ahh-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   Cannibal class, killing the sun (ahh-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                N.C.           [ch]Em[/ch]
   Bury a friend, I wanna end me[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] N.C.
   I wanna end me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
 I wanna, I wanna, I wanna end me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]
 I'm the bad guy ooo~[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
 Billie Jean is not my lover[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]B7[/ch]
 I'm the bad guy, ooo~[/tab]
